name: Avatar group
goal: Lay out a row of overlapping avatars with an automatic +N overflow chip when the count exceeds a max.
description: Container for ce-avatar (or arbitrary HTML) children that visually overlaps each child by a configurable amount and renders a +N chip in their stead once the total exceeds max. Propagates its size attribute to size-aware ce-avatar children for consistent sizing.

props.name: max
props.description: Number of children to render before collapsing the remainder into a +N chip.

props.name: size
props.description: Sizes the overflow chip and propagates to size-aware ce-avatar children.

props.name: overlap
props.description: Pixel overlap between adjacent children (negative margin).

slots.description: Avatar children (typically ce-avatar but arbitrary HTML is accepted per CDR-006).

cssVariables.name: --ce-avatar-group-overlap
cssVariables.description: Computed pixel overlap, set internally from the overlap attribute.

sideEffects.description: Sets display:none on children beyond max.
sideEffects.reason: Mechanism for collapsing overflow without restructuring slotted nodes.
